name: ProjectM : Dream
short_description: Project M - Dream is a teaser to the interactive VR adventure game currently in development by EVR Studio. In this experience, get an up close sneak peek at one of the game characters that will appear in EVR STUDIO’s upcoming adventure game.
detailed_description:
Project M - Dream is a teaser to the interactive VR adventure game currently in development by EVR Studio.
In this experience, one of the game characters that will appear in EVR STUDIO’s upcoming adventure game is rendered in real-time.
Get a glimpse of the digital character up close as she briefly appears and fades away in a dream like setting.
about_the_game:
